parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT id, name, email, role, avatar,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', last_seen_at) AS lastSeen
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.users`
WHERE status = 'active'
  AND last_seen_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE)
ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT cliente IGNORE NULLS) as clientes,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT praca IGNORE NULLS) as pracas,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT veiculo IGNORE NULLS) as veiculos,
ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT meio IGNORE NULLS) as meios
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE dt_inicio_veic IS NOT NULL
  AND dt_inicio_veic >= '{{ $json.body.data_inicio }}'
  AND dt_fim_veic <= '{{ $json.body.data_fim }}'

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending')  AS total_pending,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS total_approved,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS total_rejected,
  COUNT(*)                      AS total_geral,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 0) AS novos_pendentes,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 1) AS complementos_pendentes
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
    AND ingestion_time BETWEEN
        TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}')
        AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(n_pi), ''), submission_id),
               COALESCE(is_complement, 0)
    ORDER BY ingestion_time DESC, submission_id DESC
  ) = 1
)

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.submission_id, c.n_pi, c.cliente, c.veiculo, c.nome_contato, c.email_contato, c.meio,
  c.total_arquivos, c.is_complement, c.webViewLink, c.status, c.rejection_count,
  c.rejection_reason, c.approval_user, c.observacoes,
  p.CAMPANHA AS campanha, p.PRACA AS praca,
  p.VALOR AS valor_liquido, p.PRODUTO AS produto, p.PLANILHA AS planilha,
  p.VENCIMENTO AS vencimento, p.SIT_CHECKI AS liberado_publi,
  p.PERIODO AS periodo_veic,
  r.responsavel AS assigned_to,
  COALESCE(r.conta,
    CASE
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (65612,65613,65614,65767,65768,65769,67747) THEN 'Eudora'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58587,59075) THEN 'BOTI SUL'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58589,59074) THEN 'BOTI SP'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (63642,63643) THEN 'BOTI SP INT'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58590,62313) THEN 'BOTI NE'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58591,59073) THEN 'BOTI SE'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68294,68293) THEN 'BOTI RS'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68037) THEN 'AERO'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68416) THEN 'BOTI SC'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68417) THEN 'BOTI SC FRANQUEADOS'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (54354) THEN 'UNINTER'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (69103) THEN 'MAX ATACADISTA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (50754) THEN 'FRIMESA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (10747,59148) THEN 'VOLVO'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (4931) THEN 'SHOPPING MULLER'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (62498) THEN 'SERVOPA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (66384,65253,66385) THEN 'UNICRED'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (63871) THEN 'FRISIA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (59081) THEN 'BOTI BRASIL'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (64809) THEN 'VULT'
      ELSE COALESCE(c.cliente, 'Outros')
    END
  ) AS conta,
  r.responsavel_nome,
  NULLIF(c.approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(c.rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at,
  c.ingestion_time AS created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pis_clientes` p
  ON c.n_pi = CAST(p.PEDIDO AS STRING)
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` r
  ON c.n_pi = r.n_pi
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(c.submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND (c.status IS NULL OR c.status = 'pending' OR c.status = '')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.n_pi), ''), c.submission_id),
               COALESCE(c.is_complement, 0)
  ORDER BY c.ingestion_time DESC, c.submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(c.submission_id, '_')[OFFSET(0)] AS INT64) DESC NULLS LAST

  '{{ (() => { const _r = ($('Validar Dados').first().json.headers || {})["x-real-ip"] || ($('Validar Dados').first().json.headers || {})["x-forwarded-for"] || "unknown"; const _c = _r.includes(",") ? _r.split(",")[0].trim() : _r; return /^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}$/.test(_c) || /^([0-9a-fA-F]{0,4}:){2,7}[0-9a-fA-F]{0,4}$/.test(_c) ? _c : "unknown"; })() }}',
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
)

parameters.sqlQuery:
UPDATE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
SET
  status           = 'rejected',
  approval_user    = '{{ $('Validar Dados').first().json.body.approval_user }}',
  rejection_reason = '{{ $('Validar Dados').first().json.body.reason || '' }}',
  rejection_count  = COALESCE(rejection_count, 0) + 1,
  rejected_at      = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
  pdf_link         = '{{ $json.pdfLink || '' }}'
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $('Validar Dados').first().json.body.id }}'
  AND (status = 'pending' OR status IS NULL OR status = '')

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.submission_id, c.n_pi, c.cliente, c.veiculo, c.nome_contato, c.email_contato, c.meio,
  c.total_arquivos, c.is_complement, c.webViewLink, c.status, c.rejection_count,
  c.rejection_reason, c.approval_user, c.observacoes,
  p.CAMPANHA AS campanha, p.PRACA AS praca,
  p.VALOR AS valor_liquido, p.PRODUTO AS produto, p.PLANILHA AS planilha,
  p.VENCIMENTO AS vencimento, p.SIT_CHECKI AS liberado_publi,
  p.PERIODO AS periodo_veic,
  r.responsavel AS assigned_to,
  COALESCE(r.conta,
    CASE
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (65612,65613,65614,65767,65768,65769,67747) THEN 'Eudora'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58587,59075) THEN 'BOTI SUL'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58589,59074) THEN 'BOTI SP'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (63642,63643) THEN 'BOTI SP INT'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58590,62313) THEN 'BOTI NE'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (58591,59073) THEN 'BOTI SE'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68294,68293) THEN 'BOTI RS'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68037) THEN 'AERO'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68416) THEN 'BOTI SC'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (68417) THEN 'BOTI SC FRANQUEADOS'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (54354) THEN 'UNINTER'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (69103) THEN 'MAX ATACADISTA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (50754) THEN 'FRIMESA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (10747,59148) THEN 'VOLVO'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (4931) THEN 'SHOPPING MULLER'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (62498) THEN 'SERVOPA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (66384,65253,66385) THEN 'UNICRED'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (63871) THEN 'FRISIA'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (59081) THEN 'BOTI BRASIL'
      WHEN SAFE_CAST(p.cod_client AS INT64) IN (64809) THEN 'VULT'
      ELSE COALESCE(c.cliente, 'Outros')
    END
  ) AS conta,
  r.responsavel_nome,
  NULLIF(c.approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(c.rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at,
  c.ingestion_time as created_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pis_clientes` p
  ON c.n_pi = CAST(p.PEDIDO AS STRING)
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` r
  ON c.n_pi = r.n_pi
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(c.submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND NOT STARTS_WITH(c.submission_id, 'err_')
  AND (c.status IS NULL OR c.status != 'ERROR')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.n_pi), ''), c.submission_id),
               COALESCE(c.is_complement, 0)
  ORDER BY c.ingestion_time DESC, c.submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY c.ingestion_time DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.submission_id, c.n_pi, c.cliente, c.veiculo, c.nome_contato, c.email_contato, c.meio,
  c.total_arquivos, c.is_complement, c.webViewLink, c.status, c.rejection_count,
  c.rejection_reason, c.approval_user, c.observacoes,
  p.CAMPANHA AS campanha, p.PRACA AS praca,
  p.VALOR AS valor_liquido, p.PRODUTO AS produto, p.PLANILHA AS planilha,
  p.VENCIMENTO AS vencimento, p.SIT_CHECKI AS liberado_publi,
  p.PERIODO AS periodo_veic,
  r.responsavel AS assigned_to, COALESCE(r.conta, CAST(p.PLANILHA AS STRING), c.cliente) AS conta,
  r.responsavel_nome,
  NULLIF(c.approved_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS approved_at,
  NULLIF(c.rejected_at, TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01')) AS rejected_at
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pis_clientes` p
  ON c.n_pi = CAST(p.PEDIDO AS STRING)
LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` r
  ON c.n_pi = r.n_pi
WHERE
  NOT STARTS_WITH(c.submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.status || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR c.status = '{{ $json.body.status || \"\" }}')
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.cliente || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR UPPER(c.cliente) LIKE UPPER('%{{ $json.body.cliente || \"\" }}%'))
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.n_pi || \"\" }}' AS STRING) = '' OR c.n_pi = '{{ $json.body.n_pi || \"\" }}')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.n_pi), ''), c.submission_id),
               COALESCE(c.is_complement, 0)
  ORDER BY c.ingestion_time DESC, c.submission_id DESC
) = 1
ORDER BY c.ingestion_time DESC

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: "Usuario registrado com sucesso" } }}

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const msg = $json.error?.message || ''; const code = msg.startsWith('AUTH_') ? 401 : msg.startsWith('TOKEN') ? 401 : msg.startsWith('INVALID_CREDENTIALS') ? 401 : msg.startsWith('RATE_LIMIT') ? 429 : msg.startsWith('FORBIDDEN') ? 403 : msg.startsWith('MISSING') ? 400 : msg.startsWith('INVALID_') ? 400 : 500; const safeMsg = code === 401 ? 'Credenciais invalidas' : code === 403 ? 'Sem permissao' : code === 429 ? 'Muitas tentativas. Aguarde.' : code === 400 ? 'Requisicao invalida' : 'Erro interno'; return { success: false, error: safeMsg, statusCode: code }; })() }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  ci.id_imagem,
  ci.id_pasta,
  ci.detalhe,
  ci.endereco,
  ci.n_pi,
  ci.mime_type
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_imagens` ci
WHERE ci.id_imagem != 'sem_arquivo'
  AND CAST(ci.n_pi AS STRING) = (
    SELECT cl.n_pi
    FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` cl
    WHERE cl.submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
    LIMIT 1
  )
ORDER BY ci.detalhe, ci.endereco

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT 'sla' AS alert_type, submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, meio,
  TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), ingestion_time, HOUR) AS sla_hours,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS rejection_count
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), ingestion_time, HOUR) > 48
  AND ('{{ $json._auth.role }}' = 'admin' OR assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reincidencia' AS alert_type, submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, nome_contato, meio,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS sla_hours, rejection_count
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE COALESCE(rejection_count,0) > 2
  AND ('{{ $json._auth.role }}' = 'admin' OR assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}')
ORDER BY sla_hours DESC
LIMIT 200

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  nome_contato, email_contato, telefone,
  COUNT(*) AS total_envios,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS aprovados,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS rejeitados,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(status = 'approved') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS taxa_aprovacao,
  AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio,
  MAX(ingestion_time) AS ultimo_envio
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
GROUP BY nome_contato, email_contato, telefone
ORDER BY total_envios DESC
LIMIT 100

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH checking_stats AS (
  SELECT assigned_to,
    COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS baixados,
    COUNTIF(status = 'pending') AS pendentes,
    COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS rejeitados,
    AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
    AND ingestion_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}') AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
  GROUP BY assigned_to
),
pauta_stats AS (
  SELECT r.responsavel_nome AS assigned_to,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.n_pi) AS pauta_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.submission_id IS NOT NULL THEN r.n_pi END) AS pauta_recebidos,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.submission_id IS NULL THEN r.n_pi END) AS pauta_aguardando
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` r
  LEFT JOIN `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
    ON CAST(r.n_pi AS STRING) = CAST(c.n_pi AS STRING)
    AND NOT STARTS_WITH(COALESCE(c.submission_id, ''), 'rej_')
  GROUP BY r.responsavel_nome
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(cs.assigned_to, ps.assigned_to) AS assigned_to,
  COALESCE(cs.baixados, 0) AS baixados,
  COALESCE(cs.pendentes, 0) AS pendentes,
  COALESCE(cs.rejeitados, 0) AS rejeitados,
  cs.sla_medio,
  COALESCE(ps.pauta_total, 0) AS pauta_total,
  COALESCE(ps.pauta_recebidos, 0) AS pauta_recebidos,
  COALESCE(ps.pauta_aguardando, 0) AS pauta_aguardando
FROM checking_stats cs
FULL OUTER JOIN pauta_stats ps ON cs.assigned_to = ps.assigned_to
ORDER BY pendentes DESC

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT submission_id, n_pi, cliente, veiculo, meio, status, ingestion_time
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(submission_id, 'rej_')
  AND assigned_to = '{{ $json._auth.email }}'
  AND ingestion_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_from || "2026-01-01" }}') AND TIMESTAMP('{{ $json.body.date_to || "2026-12-31" }}')
ORDER BY ingestion_time ASC

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.submission_id, c.n_pi, c.cliente, c.veiculo, c.meio, c.nome_contato,
  c.total_arquivos, c.is_complement, c.status, c.rejection_count, c.rejection_reason, c.observacoes,
  s.total_envios, s.aprovados, s.rejeitados, s.taxa_aprovacao, s.sla_medio
FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs` c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT nome_contato,
    COUNT(*) AS total_envios,
    COUNTIF(status='approved') AS aprovados,
    COUNTIF(status='rejected') AS rejeitados,
    ROUND(COUNTIF(status='approved')/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1) AS taxa_aprovacao,
    AVG(CASE WHEN status='approved' THEN TIMESTAMP_DIFF(approved_at, ingestion_time, HOUR) END) AS sla_medio
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  GROUP BY nome_contato
) s ON s.nome_contato = c.nome_contato
WHERE c.submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
LIMIT 1

googleBigQueryOAuth2Api.name: Painel Cliente - Painel de Aprovação - Formulario

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH pauta_raw AS (
  SELECT
    p.num_pi AS n_pi,
    p.situacao_pi,
    CAST(p.cod_cliente AS STRING) AS cod_cliente,
    p.veiculo,
    p.periodo,
    p.liquido,
    p.campanha,
    p.produto,
    p.praca,
    p.meio,
    p.liberado_no_publi AS liberado_publi,
    CASE
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (65612,65613,65614,65767,65768,65769,67747) THEN 'Eudora'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (66384,65253,66385) THEN 'Unicred'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (58587,59075) THEN 'Boti Sul'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (58589,59074) THEN 'Boti SP'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (63642,63643) THEN 'Boti SP INT'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (58590,62313) THEN 'Boti NE'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (58591,59073) THEN 'Boti SE'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (68294,68293) THEN 'Boti RS'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (68037) THEN 'AERO'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (68416) THEN 'BOTI SC'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (68417) THEN 'BOTI SC FRANQUEADOS'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (54354) THEN 'UNINTER'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (69103) THEN 'MAX ATACADISTA'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (50754) THEN 'FRIMESA'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (10747,59148) THEN 'VOLVO'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (4931) THEN 'SHOPPING MULLER'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (62498) THEN 'SERVOPA'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (63871) THEN 'FRISIA'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (59081) THEN 'BOTI BRASIL'
      WHEN p.cod_cliente IN (64809) THEN 'VULT'
      ELSE COALESCE(p.cliente, 'Outros')
    END AS conta,
    FORMAT_DATETIME('%Y-%m', p.periodo) AS mes_referencia,
    p.vencimento
  FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pauta_checking` p
  WHERE p.situacao_pi != 'Cancelado'
    AND p.num_pi IS NOT NULL
    AND p.num_pi != '0'
    AND p.meio NOT IN ('PN','PW','IB','IS','IV','IA','ID','MS','IN')
),
pauta AS (
  -- F4: 1 linha por PI/mes; agrega pracas para nao multiplicar
  SELECT n_pi, mes_referencia,
    ANY_VALUE(situacao_pi) AS situacao_pi,
    ANY_VALUE(cod_cliente) AS cod_cliente,
    ANY_VALUE(veiculo) AS veiculo,
    MIN(periodo) AS periodo,
    SUM(liquido) AS liquido,
    ANY_VALUE(campanha) AS campanha,
    ANY_VALUE(produto) AS produto,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT praca, ', ' ORDER BY praca) AS praca,
    ANY_VALUE(meio) AS meio,
    ANY_VALUE(liberado_publi) AS liberado_publi,
    ANY_VALUE(conta) AS conta,
    MAX(vencimento) AS vencimento,
    COUNT(*) AS linhas_pauta
  FROM pauta_raw
  GROUP BY n_pi, mes_referencia
),
resp AS (
  SELECT * FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis`
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n_pi, mes_referencia ORDER BY atribuido_em DESC) = 1
),
logs AS (
  SELECT * FROM `checking-grupoom.form_checking.checking_logs`
  WHERE NOT STARTS_WITH(COALESCE(submission_id, ''), 'rej_')
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(n_pi), ''), submission_id)
    ORDER BY COALESCE(is_complement, 0) ASC, ingestion_time DESC, submission_id DESC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  pa.n_pi,
  pa.situacao_pi,
  pa.cod_cliente,
  pa.veiculo,
  pa.periodo,
  pa.liquido,
  pa.campanha,
  pa.produto,
  pa.praca,
  pa.meio,
  pa.liberado_publi,
  pa.conta,
  pa.mes_referencia,
  pa.linhas_pauta,
  COALESCE(r.responsavel_nome, '') AS responsavel,
  r.responsavel AS responsavel_email,
  CASE
    WHEN c.submission_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'recebido'
    ELSE 'aguardando'
  END AS status_formulario,
  c.status AS status_checking,
  c.submission_id,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', c.ingestion_time) AS ingestion_time,
  pa.vencimento
FROM pauta pa
LEFT JOIN resp r
  ON pa.n_pi = CAST(r.n_pi AS STRING)
  AND pa.mes_referencia = r.mes_referencia
LEFT JOIN logs c
  ON pa.n_pi = CAST(c.n_pi AS STRING)
WHERE ('{{ $json.body.mes_referencia || \"\" }}' = '' OR pa.mes_referencia = '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}')
  AND ('{{ $json.body.conta || \"\" }}' = '' OR pa.conta = '{{ $json.body.conta }}')
ORDER BY pa.conta, pa.n_pi

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `checking-grupoom.form_checking.pi_responsaveis` T
USING (SELECT '{{ $json.body.n_pi }}' AS n_pi, '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}' AS mes_referencia) S
ON T.n_pi = S.n_pi AND T.mes_referencia = S.mes_referencia
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
  responsavel = '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}',
  responsavel_nome = '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}',
  conta = '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}',
  atribuido_por = '{{ $json._auth?.email || "sistema" }}',
  atribuido_em = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
  (n_pi, responsavel, responsavel_nome, mes_referencia, conta, atribuido_por, atribuido_em)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.body.n_pi }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}', '{{ $json.body.responsavel }}', '{{ $json.body.mes_referencia }}', '{{ $json.body.conta || "" }}', '{{ $json._auth?.email || "sistema" }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

SET status = '{{ $json.body.status }}',
    approval_user = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'pending' THEN NULL ELSE '{{ $json.body.approval_user || $json._auth?.email || "" }}' END,
    approved_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'approved' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'pending' THEN NULL ELSE approved_at END,
    rejected_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'rejected' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHEN '{{ $json.body.status }}' = 'pending' THEN NULL ELSE rejected_at END
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'
